verdict: Moderate risk of AI displacement, with some tasks being automated but human judgment and strategic decision-making still required.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine cognitive tasks are being automated
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks like compiling lists, developing pricing strategies, and analyzing sales forecasting data can be automated using AI tools.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative judgment is still required
reasoning_steps.body: While AI can analyze market trends, product managers need to make strategic decisions that require creative judgment and critical thinking.

evidence_ledger.contribution: Identify tasks that are being automated or can be augmented with AI tools
Understand the scope of work and responsibilities of a Product Manager

adjacent_careers.name: Marketing Analyst
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Marketing analysts focus on data analysis and campaign optimization, which are complementary to product management tasks.

adjacent_careers.name: Product Specialist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Product specialists work closely with product managers to develop product features and strategies, but their focus is more on technical aspects.

recent_developments.headline: AI-powered marketing automation tools gain popularity
recent_developments.impact: These tools can automate routine marketing tasks, but human judgment and strategic decision-making are still essential.

recent_developments.headline: AI coding assistants see broad enterprise adoption
recent_developments.impact: Major firms report 25–30% of new code is now AI-generated and reviewed by engineers.

quotes.quote: Software engineering will be very different by the end of 2025. Most code will be written by AI, with human engineers reviewing and directing.
quotes.speaker: Dario Amodei
quotes.title: CEO, Anthropic

quotes.quote: AI is going to be the biggest technological shift of our lifetimes. Bigger than mobile, bigger than the web. Inside Microsoft, more than 30 percent of the code in some projects is now written by AI.
quotes.speaker: Satya Nadella
quotes.title: CEO, Microsoft

quotes.quote: More than a quarter of new code at Google is generated by AI, then reviewed and accepted by engineers.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet
